title: Genshin Impact Furina GUI
description: Furina-themed Minecraft UI pack with elegant visuals inspired by Genshin Impact.
body:
# 🌊 Shun’s Furina GUI Pack 🌊 ## A Complete Hydro-Themed Interface Overhaul Transform your Minecraft experience with a fully redesigned interface inspired by **Furina** from _Genshin Impact_. Elegant blue tones, refined Hydro accents, and a clean cinematic layout bring Fontaine’s aesthetic directly into your game. --- ### ✨ Features **Fully** reworked: - Inventory - Crafting table & furnace screens - Villager trading interface - Chests, menus, and more --- ### 🎨 Design Philosophy > Clean. Elegant. Playable. > Designed to enhance aesthetics without sacrificing readability. Every element is carefully aligned and color-balanced to ensure items remain visible and comfortable during long play sessions. --- ### 📦 Compatibility 1. Supports Minecraft **1.16.x – 1.21.xx** 2. Works with Vanilla & most client setups 3. Lightweight and optimized ---
🔎 What’s Included? >Inventory Chests (54x / 27x) Barrel Shulker Box Crafting Table Anvil Enchanting Table Furnace Smoker Smithing Table Tab Inventory Tab Search Tab Items Main Menu Panorama
--- Genshin Impact and its characters are property of **HoYoverse**. This is an unofficial fan-made resource pack.
